title: Entities
description: Schema for the entities list used by each universe metadata file. Add one object per entity type you want to extract.

items.description: Configuration for a single entity type.

name.description: Unique entity type id. Use a stable lowercase/plural-style name such as 'characters' or 'locations'.

description.description: Plain-language explanation of what belongs in this entity type.

extractionFocus.description: Required guidance for extractors: capture meaningful facts and context about this entity type, not just names/titles.

examples.description: Representative valid values for this entity type. Include strong canonical examples.

rules.description: Optional acceptance rules for extraction. Write short, strict, testable statements.

invalid.description: Optional negative examples that should be rejected for this entity type.

requiredEntities.description: Optional list of other entity type names that must also be present for a valid extraction.
